About Us

Dear Students

As the Dean of Students’ Office, we are here for you to make your university life more meaningful and productive. From the Psychological Counseling and Guidance Center (PDRM) to the Erasmus Office, from the Career Office to the Alumni Office, our many units support you every step of the way. We are working to ensure that you have a strong and comprehensive university experience with events, projects and community activities that will enrich your campus life.

Our goal is to guide you to shape not only your present but also your future. In addition to your academic achievements, our priority is to contribute to your personal development and social responsibility awareness. Our door is always open; we are here to find solutions with you and listen to your problems.

Let’s all share the pride of being a part of the Kadir Has University family!

Love and regards,

Dean of Students

The Student Dean’s Office at Kadir Has University was established to serve as a central point of contact for students facing any issues related to their academic or social life. The following units are affiliated with the Dean’s Office:

Alumni Office

Career Office

Campus Life Office

Erasmus and Exchange Office

Psychological Counseling and Guidance Unit
